title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
changelog: Security hardening: OBS API secret auth, CORS locked to app origin, SSRF blocklist, nginx rate limiting, Lua URL/shell-injection guard; match cards sorted ascending (next game first).
